name: PCB Layout & Signal Integrity
description: PCB 布局:布线、信号完整性、EMI 与散热设计

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['pcb','layout','signal_integrity','emi','thermal'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(pcb layout|trace impedance|signal integrity|ground plane|decoupling cap|differential pair|via stitch|emi|erc|drc)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
